title: Competitive & Positioning Findings
description: Output of Agent C - competitors, parity/differentiation, positioning, messaging pillars, and research gaps.

competitors.description: List of key competitors with inferred strengths, weaknesses, and positioning.

parity_opportunities.description: Things we must match to avoid falling behind competitors.

differentiation_opportunities.description: Areas where the product can clearly differentiate from competitors.

recommended_positioning.description: High-level positioning statement: who it's for, value, why better than alternatives.

messaging_pillars.description: 3–5 key messaging pillars that can be reused directly in PRDs / exec summaries.

research_gaps.description: Explicit gaps or missing data points in the competitive analysis.
